subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-11
subcodes.first_line: How spiritual and glorious were those divine days spent amongst the believers of God in the Western world!... Truly, this period has not been productive. At least when we were in America, we were busy and constantly met with people
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه این مدت بیفایده گذشت باز در امریکا که بودیم مشغول بودیم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
